description: Automatic model routing rules for this OpenClaw workspace. The assistant will pick models based on task complexity unless you request an override.
notes: Heartbeat and quick tasks default to GPT-5.4 nano (openai/gpt-5.4-nano). If the model is unavailable the assistant will fall back to openai/gpt-5-mini unless you instruct otherwise. You can override per-task by specifying 'model: <model-name>'.
